title: steffensia radula
intro: Steffensia radula, also known as the "Tawau Hill White Steffensia," is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. This plant is native to Borneo and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Steffensia radula has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Steffensia radula often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams for medicinal purposes.
